commands.purpose: Print themes for a tenant (or every tenant with --tenant=*). Filter --mode=light|dark, --active for is_active=true only. Table columns: id, mode, name, selected_preset_slug, is_active, activated_at.
Print the full theme row + resolved tokens_snapshot + contrast audit findings for one theme. Useful for support incident reproduction.
Activate a theme from CLI. Skips the HTTP surface — useful for scripted deployments (e.g. rollback to a prior theme in an incident). --force skips the contrast auditor's warning stage.
Dry-run resolve + render. Output the resolved token map + compiled CSS + contrast findings to --out (path or stdout). --format=json|css toggles between raw token map JSON and the compiled CSS.
Print presets. --platform-only shows platform-provided (tenant_id NULL). --tenant scopes to a tenant's custom presets. --category filters.

Create a preset from CLI. --source=<preset-slug> clones an existing preset's tokens as the starting point. --tenant unset writes a platform preset (requires --allow-platform + guard is platform_admin at invocation).
Clone an existing preset (platform or tenant custom) into a new tenant custom preset. --slug + --name required; --tenant defaults to the caller's tenant.

Per-tenant override count for accessibility + budget audit. --audit adds a contrast-ratio + vocabulary-drift check across every override. Table columns: tenant_id, theme_id, override_count, budget_remaining, contrast_findings_count.
